mechanics.excerpt: the Mech Star Commander commands the entire Nova: Star Captain commands Binary Trinary; Supernova commander is usually the Mech unit leader. Clusters arc commanded by Star Colonel. Galaxies by Galaxy Commanders The naval service uses most of the same ranks.
